text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, December 07. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Busy day for sports! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Neighborhood connections are fun. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
